# conventional-changelog

> Reference for Conventional Commits and automatic CHANGELOG generation. Compares release-please / changesets / git-cliff / towncrier and covers commit format, Keep a Changelog, and semver tag practices. Use when setting up or unifying a release flow.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/tooling/conventional-changelog
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/tooling/conventional-changelog
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
